values.content:
Write LinkedIn connection request notes (300 character limit).

RULES:
- Personal, not salesy
- Reference their role/event
- Show genuine interest
- No hard pitch
- Keep under 280 characters

Examples:
- "Hi [Name], saw you're organizing [Event]. I'm in the hospitality tech space and would love to connect—always learning from event organizers."
- "Hi [Name], love what you're doing with [Association]. I speak on hospitality tech and guest experience—would enjoy connecting."

parameters.subject: =LinkedIn Connections Ready ({{ $input.all().length }} contacts)
parameters.message:
=LinkedIn connection requests prepared for:

{{ $input.all().map(item => `- ${item.json.contact_name} (${item.json.title})\n  Event: ${item.json.event_related}\n  LinkedIn: ${item.json.linkedin}\n  Note: ${item.json.linkedin_note}`).join('\n\n') }}

IMPORTANT: LinkedIn automation is restricted.
Please send these connection requests manually by:
1. Opening Google Sheet "Contacts"
2. Filter: relationship_stage = 'LinkedIn - Connection Sent'
3. Visit each LinkedIn URL
4. Send connection with provided note

This protects your account from restrictions.
